ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequencing_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing run */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequencing run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the sequencing run was conducted */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Sequencing platform used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the run is part of */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the experiment the run is part of */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* Name of the sequencing center */,
  "sequencing_instrument" TEXT /* Specific instrument model used for sequencing */,
  "total_reads" INTEGER /* Total number of reads generated in the run */,
  "passed_qc" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the run passed quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution or organization conducting the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used in the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the experiment is part of */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of biological sample used (e.g., tissue, blood) */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the biological sample (e.g., patient, cell line) */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the biological sample */,
  "library_prep_kit" TEXT /* Name of the library preparation kit used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fusion_genes" (
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fusion gene */,
  "fusion_name" TEXT /* Name of the fusion gene */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequencing run where the fusion was detected */,
  "reference_reads_1" INTEGER /* Number of reference reads from the first gene */,
  "reference_reads_2" INTEGER /* Number of reference reads from the second gene */,
  "fusion_supporting_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads supporting the fusion */,
  "left_breakpoint" TEXT /* Location of the left breakpoint in the genome */,
  "right_breakpoint" TEXT /* Location of the right breakpoint in the genome */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the fusion (e.g., Fusion) */,
  "in_ntc" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fusion is present in the no template control (NTC) */,
  "spanning_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads spanning the fusion breakpoint */,
  "spanning_reads_dedup" INTEGER /* Number of deduplicated reads spanning the fusion breakpoint */,
  "split_reads" INTEGER /* Number of split reads supporting the fusion */,
  "split_reads_dedup" INTEGER /* Number of deduplicated split reads supporting the fusion */,
  "fusion_caller" TEXT /* Name of the fusion caller tool used */,
  "fusion_score" REAL /* Score indicating the confidence level of the fusion detection */,
  "cancer_type" TEXT /* Type of cancer associated with the fusion gene */,
  "disease_state" TEXT /* State of the disease (e.g., primary, metastatic) */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of treatment (e.g., naive, post-treatment) */,
  "pathogenicity" TEXT /* Pathogenicity of the fusion gene (e.g., benign, pathogenic) */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the fusion gene (e.g., actionable, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fusion_genes_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES sequencing_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fusion_genes_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES fusion_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fusion_genes_fusion_caller FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_caller") REFERENCES fusion_callers ("caller_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fusion_genes_fusion_score FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_score") REFERENCES fusion_scores ("score_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene annotation */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fusion gene the annotation is for */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "exons" TEXT /* Exons of the gene (comma-separated list) */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the gene (e.g., protein_coding, lncRNA) */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Function of the gene (e.g., oncogene, tumor suppressor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_fusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_id") REFERENCES fusion_genes ("fusion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fusion_callers" (
  "caller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fusion caller */,
  "caller_name" TEXT /* Name of the fusion caller tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the fusion caller tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fusion caller tool */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the fusion caller tool */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the fusion caller tool was installed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the fusion caller tool was last updated */,
  "installation_path" TEXT /* Path where the fusion caller tool is installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fusion_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "score_name" TEXT /* Name of the score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the score */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the score */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the score in the overall confidence calculation */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the score (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or citation for the scoring method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breakpoints" (
  "breakpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breakpoint */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fusion gene the breakpoint is for */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the breakpoint is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the breakpoint on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the breakpoint (e.g., +, -) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the breakpoint (e.g., left, right) */,
  "sequence_context" TEXT /* Sequence context around the breakpoint */,
  "variant_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the breakpoint on the gene (e.g., frameshift, in-frame) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breakpoints_fusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_id") REFERENCES fusion_genes ("fusion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "read_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each read support entry */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fusion gene the read support is for */,
  "read_type" TEXT /* Type of the read (e.g., reference, supporting, spanning, split) */,
  "read_count" INTEGER /* Number of reads of the specified type */,
  "dedup_count" INTEGER /* Number of deduplicated reads of the specified type */,
  "read_quality" INTEGER /* Quality score of the reads (e.g., Phred score) */,
  "read_length" INTEGER /* Length of the reads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_read_support_fusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_id") REFERENCES fusion_genes ("fusion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ntc_status" (
  "ntc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NTC status entry */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fusion gene the NTC status is for */,
  "in_ntc" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fusion is present in the no template control (NTC) */,
  "ntc_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads in the NTC */,
  "ntc_supporting_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads supporting the fusion in the NTC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ntc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ntc_status_fusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_id") REFERENCES fusion_genes ("fusion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fusion_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fusion type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fusion type (e.g., Fusion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fusion type */,
  "implication" TEXT /* Implication of the fusion type (e.g., oncogenic, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, bioinformatician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, bioinformatics) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fusion gene being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the fusion gene data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the fusion gene data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_id") REFERENCES fusion_genes ("fusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis version */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fusion gene the version is for */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the analysis */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_versions_fusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_id") REFERENCES fusion_genes ("fusion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external validation */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fusion gene the validation is for */,
  "validation_tool" TEXT /* Name of the external validation tool used */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the external validation (e.g., confirmed, rejected) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the external validation was conducted */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for external validation (e.g., PCR, Sanger sequencing) */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Score or result from the validation method */,
  "validation_institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization that conducted the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_validations_fusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_id") REFERENCES fusion_genes ("fusion_id")
)
